description: Vertical (portrait) graphic in DHS public affairs branding. The background is a softened, blurred photo of a rippling American flag in blue tones with visible white stars and a sliver of red stripes at the bottom. Top center white bold text reads 'DHS Celebrates National Immigrant Heritage Month.' Below is an inset rectangular color photo of a smiling middle-aged man with short hair seated in an office, wearing a red, white, and blue tropical print shirt and a beaded lanyard. Beneath, a large white quote with quotation marks reads: 'The significance of Immigrant Heritage Month to me is it is a reminder that the United States of America offers the greatest opportunity for anyone no matter where they come from.' A blue rounded banner at the bottom left contains white text 'Shane B.', 'FLETC, Civil Engineer (Structural)', '1st generation from Canada.' The DHS seal sits at the bottom right.
notable_text: DHS Celebrates National Immigrant Heritage Month; 'The significance of Immigrant Heritage Month to me is it is a reminder that the United States of America offers the greatest opportunity for anyone no matter where they come from.'; Shane B., FLETC, Civil Engineer (Structural), 1st generation from Canada
